name: Dharanitharan P
title: Backend Engineer
tagline: Building the rails that move money.
summary: Backend engineer specializing in high-throughput fintech infrastructure. I build payment orchestration systems, payout engines, and resilient data flows designed to stay correct under failure and scale.
longBio: I focus on the layers of fintech that operate behind the UI — orchestration systems, settlement pipelines, idempotent workflows, and distributed state management. My approach prioritizes correctness under stress: handling retries, race conditions, partial failures, and external system instability. I design systems assuming failure is inevitable, ensuring consistency, traceability, and recovery across every transaction lifecycle.
availability: Open to high-impact backend and fintech engineering roles

principles.title: Correctness over cleverness
principles.body: Idempotency, reconciliation, and failure handling are core system guarantees, not add-ons.

principles.title: Measure before you optimize
principles.body: Latency distributions and system metrics drive every performance decision.

principles.title: Design for failure
principles.body: Systems are built assuming downstream failures, retries, and partial success scenarios.
